mapper.select: SELECT FOOD_ID AS foodId, USER_ID AS userId, CATEGORY_ID AS categoryId, FOOD_NAME AS foodName, CALORIES_PER_GRAM AS caloriesPerGram, IS_LIQUID AS isLiquid, ML_TO_G_RATIO AS mlToGRatio, IMAGE_OBJECT_KEY AS imageObjectKey FROM USER_FOOD_PRESETS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY FOOD_NAME ASC

SELECT FOOD_ID AS foodId, USER_ID AS userId, CATEGORY_ID AS categoryId, FOOD_NAME AS foodName, CALORIES_PER_GRAM AS caloriesPerGram, IS_LIQUID AS isLiquid, ML_TO_G_RATIO AS mlToGRatio, IMAGE_OBJECT_KEY AS imageObjectKey FROM USER_FOOD_PRESETS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND FOOD_NAME = #{foodName} AND DEL_FLAG = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_FOOD_PRESETS SET CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId}, CALORIES_PER_GRAM = #{caloriesPerGram}, IS_LIQUID = #{isLiquid}, ML_TO_G_RATIO = #{mlToGRatio}, IMAGE_OBJECT_KEY = #{imageObjectKey}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE FOOD_ID = #{foodId} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
mapper.select: SELECT DRUG_ID AS drugId, USER_ID AS userId, DRUG_NAME AS drugName, DEFAULT_DOSAGE AS defaultDosage, IMAGE_OBJECT_KEY AS imageObjectKey FROM USER_MEDICATION_PRESETS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY DRUG_NAME ASC

SELECT DRUG_ID AS drugId, USER_ID AS userId, DRUG_NAME AS drugName, DEFAULT_DOSAGE AS defaultDosage, IMAGE_OBJECT_KEY AS imageObjectKey FROM USER_MEDICATION_PRESETS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND DRUG_NAME = #{drugName} AND DEL_FLAG = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_MEDICATION_PRESETS SET DEFAULT_DOSAGE = #{defaultDosage}, IMAGE_OBJECT_KEY = #{imageObjectKey}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE DRUG_ID = #{drugId} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
